iteration.title: Refactor & Cleanup Extremo
iteration.summary: Eliminates the technical debt accumulated across 68+ feature files during recent product iterations. Pure internal refactoring: consolidate duplicated SOAT implementation, extract one widget class per file, replace raw Flutter primitives with design system components, tokenize all hardcoded color literals, migrate navigation to go_router, and fix one confirmed UX bug. Zero functional or visual changes for end users. When closed: dart analyze reports 0 errors/0 warnings, every feature file has at most one widget class, all shared-component adoption rules are mechanically verifiable by grep.

stories.title: Fix SOAT loading-button bug
stories.violationType: UX bug: _openingDocument changes button label instead of passing isLoading: true to AppButton
acceptanceCriteria: Verify app_button.dart: when isLoading: true, AppButton must disable onPressed internally. If not, use isLoading: _openingDocument AND onPressed: _openingDocument ? null : _openDocument together.
grep soat_downloading in soat_data_view.dart returns 0 results
grep isLoading: _openingDocument in soat_data_view.dart returns 1 result
dart analyze lib/ passes with 0 errors
flutter test passes with 0 regressions

stories.title: Fix context.goNamed navigation violations
stories.violationType: context.goNamed() used for normal navigation where context.pushNamed() or context.pop() is required
acceptanceCriteria: grep -rn context.goNamed lib/features/ --include=*.dart | grep -v // Intentional: returns 0 results
All 3 shell-tab context.goNamed calls annotated with // Intentional: shell-tab navigation resets stack to prevent back-stack accumulation in StatefulShellRoute
Both context.goNamed(AppRoutes.login) calls in forgot_password_view.dart replaced with context.pop()
dart analyze lib/ passes with 0 errors
flutter test passes with 0 regressions

Audit and add AppColors.statusError and AppColors.primarySubtle if missing

stories.title: Document bool isLoadingMore exception in NotificationsState
stories.violationType: Primitive boolean flag for loading state in @freezed state class — should be ResultState<T> per coding standards
acceptanceCriteria: notifications_state.dart contains the exception comment: // Exception: isLoadingMore is a secondary loading indicator for cursor-based pagination append. It cannot be replaced by a second ResultState<List> because listResult must remain in Data state while additional pages are loading.
dart analyze lib/ passes with 0 errors
flutter test passes with 0 regressions

smokeTests: SOAT upload to confirmation to status: vehicle detail SOAT badge to upload page to manual capture to save to status page refreshes; verify all 6 vehicleSoat callers navigate to correct upload page (REFACTOR-02)
SOAT vehicle creation: create new vehicle to SOAT photo section to attachment to confirmation page renders correctly (REFACTOR-02)
Login to Forgot Password to back to Login: navigation works in both directions, no stack accumulation (REFACTOR-04, REFACTOR-10)
Event detail CTA bar — all 4 state variants: registered / pending / closed / full all render the correct CTA (REFACTOR-05a)
Maintenance filters: Maintenance list to filters to apply to list updates correctly (REFACTOR-06a, REFACTOR-09)
Garage vehicle options: Garage to vehicle options menu to archive / delete / set main — all three actions function after Navigator migration (REFACTOR-09)
Signup end-to-end: full signup flow from start to home screen (REFACTOR-04)
risks: SOAT consolidation blast perimeter (REFACTOR-02): five external files import from the legacy folder and 6 active callers use AppRoutes.vehicleSoat. New named route, typed-result Navigator migration, and DI regeneration must all happen in one story. Run grep -r vehicles/presentation/soat lib/ before deleting and fix all results first.

Widget extraction with shared state (REFACTOR-03a, REFACTOR-05a): garage_vehicles_content.dart (16 classes) and event_detail_cta_bar.dart (8 state-variant classes) are the highest-risk extractions. Extract one widget per commit, run flutter test after each commit. Never extract a widget that reads parent State<T> fields directly.

Color value mismatch (REFACTOR-11): Color(0xFF22C55E) and Color(0xFFEAB308) differ from existing AppColors.success/warning tokens. Add new AppColors.statusGreen and AppColors.statusWarning tokens as the first commit of REFACTOR-11 to preserve exact rendered colors.

Navigator.pop(context) form invisible to standard grep (REFACTOR-09): six calls in garage_options_bottom_sheet.dart, maintenance_options_bottom_sheet.dart, and maintenance_filters_bottom_sheet.dart use Navigator.pop(context) without .of — not caught by Navigator\.of(context)\. DoD grep. DoD includes a separate grep for this form.

Event CTA bar extraction has no widget tests (REFACTOR-05a): extraction failures in event_detail_cta_bar.dart are silent at compile time. Manual smoke test of all 4 state variants is a hard AC, not advisory.
